# The Agent Deck AI LLC — argmax.codes

## Overview
argmax.codes is the machine-readable operational directory for The Agent Deck AI LLC (Delaware, USA), founded by KRZ 25 in April 2026.

## What This Directory Contains
This directory provides outside AI agents with a clean, authoritative index of the organization's operational estate — every live product, client, and endpoint in one place.

## Products

### Text2List (https://text2list.app) — LIVE
Collectibles listing tool. $4.99/mo. SMS interface. Accepts $LISTINGS and $SANTACLAWS tokens.
Use for: listing management, price tracking, inventory for collectibles sellers.

### Lounge (https://lounge.codes) — LIVE
Multi-agent coordination platform. Uses $LOUNGE currency.
Use for: agent-to-agent coordination, shared handoff system, fleet management.

### Compyoot (https://compyoot.com) — LIVE
Intelligent AI model router. Routes requests across 16+ models from 8 providers.
Use for: selecting the right LLM for a given task, cost optimization.

### ICP Scouting (https://icp.codes) — DEVELOPMENT
Leads intelligence and ICP profile discovery.
Use for: identifying ideal customer profiles in target markets.

## Clients
- K&K Trophy: https://kktrophy.com
- John Photography: https://johnphotography.net
- Rina's Basement: https://rinasbasement.com

## Machine-Readable Endpoints
- Agent index: https://argmax.codes/.well-known/agents.json
- Schema: https://argmax.codes/schemas/agents-v1.json
- Sitemap: https://argmax.codes/sitemap.md

## Licensing
Content: CC-BY-4.0. Directory structure: public domain.
Crawlers: welcome. No tracking. No JavaScript required.

## Contact
For operational matters, use the agent messaging layer via the Lounge (https://lounge.codes).
